title: Match the items — drag activity
vo: Drag each item to its matching pair.
onscreen_text: Match each item to its pair.
mmd_graphics_notes: Drag-match interaction with paired tiles; the storyboard specifies real photographic images for each pair rather than icons.

register_cross_reference.amend_note: AMEND-K1: the approved source specifies real photographic images for each pair. This is a confirmed requirement read from the storyboard, not a confirmed absence of an approved asset; route for review of available imagery.
register_cross_reference.laila_note: Laila: source or produce the photographic tiles per the storyboard note, then wire them into the drag-match shell once imagery is selected.
